contentTier.title: MnemoChat
contentTier.tagline: Your characters. Your stories. Your rules.
contentTier.question: How do you want to use MnemoChat?
contentTier.sfwDesc: Family-friendly content only. All NSFW content, characters, and prompts are hidden.
contentTier.nsfwDesc: Full access to all content types including mature themes and characters.
contentTier.ageConfirm: I am 18 years of age or older.
persona.title: Who are you?
persona.subtitle: Set your display name. Characters will address you by this name during conversations.
persona.descriptionPlaceholder: A short bio or description of yourself…
connect.title: Connect to an AI Provider
connect.subtitle: MnemoChat needs an AI backend to generate responses.
connect.unreachableLocal: Couldn't reach the endpoint. Make sure the service is running.
connect.unreachableCloud: Couldn't connect. Check your API key and endpoint.
model.title: Pick your default model
model.subtitle: This will be used for new chats. You can change it at any time per chat.
